scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const cands=[path.join('.next','standalone','apps','web'),path.join('.next','standalone')];const base=cands.find(p=>fs.existsSync(path.join(p,'server.js')));if(!base){console.error('[postbuild] server.js introuvable');process.exit(1);}fs.cpSync('public',path.join(base,'public'),{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync(path.join('.next','static'),path.join(base,'.next','static'),{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('[postbuild] copied public/ and .next/static/ into',base);"
